name: Swiss
tagline: Swiss-style deck: sans-serif, 12-col grid, single accent (IKB blue / lemon yellow / lime / safety orange), 22 locked layouts.
best_for: International Typographic-style decks: product launches, KPI reports, engineering shares. Strict grid + single accent + extra-light display weights.
avoid_for: Decks that need warmth, story, or hand-drawn humanity — this style is deliberately cool and systematic.
